Current data for 2026 DRC BDBV Outbreak

Author

Noam Ross

Published

July 6, 2026

This page shows current data from the 2026 DRC BDBV outbreak. The data are updated automatically from the INRB-UMIE repository

Only raw data from confirmed cases are shown here. There are no forecasts, or corrections for likely incomplete reporting of recent cases. For data with more context, see the INRB-UMIE dashboard, or the current forecast estimates by Abbot et. al..

Download the current case data here. (Last data update: 2026-07-05 13:13:36)
